title: torenia aerinea
intro: Torenia aerinea, also known as Blue Clumsyweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Torenia aerinea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Torenia aerinea can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing it to be used in various herbal remedies.
